name: Docker Proxy
description: Docker container management tools via the NemoClaw host-side Docker proxy. Provides docker_run, docker_ps, docker_images, docker_pull, docker_stop, docker_rm, and docker_logs tools.

dockerHost.description: Docker proxy endpoint (default: inferred from DOCKER_HOST env or tcp://host.openshell.internal:2376)

dockerHost.label: Docker Proxy Host
dockerHost.help: TCP endpoint of the NemoClaw Docker proxy (e.g. tcp://host.openshell.internal:2376)
